title: UFC 329 press conference video, LIVE stream updates with Conor McGregor, Dana White
summary: Se llevó a cabo la conferencia de prensa previa a UFC 329, donde Conor McGregor y Max Holloway, estelares del evento del 11 de julio en T-Mobile Arena, intercambiaron declaraciones junto a otros luchadores como Paddy Pimblett y Benoit Saint Denis, con Dana White como maestro de ceremonias.

multimedia.caption: UFC 264 Press Conference

fullArticle:
Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) will be holding its UFC 329 press conference tonight, streaming LIVE at 10 p.m. ET in the embedded video above. Leading the charge will be UFC 329 headliners Conor McGregor and Max Holloway, who get five rounds to bang it out in the Paramount+ main event this Sat. night (July 11, 2026) inside T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. Also taking the dais are lightweight rivals Paddy Pimblett and Benoit Saint Denis. UFC CEO Dana White is expected to emcee today’s festivities.

Other than the main event, which fight are you most looking forward to at UFC 329?

“The UFC likes throwing curveballs,” Holloway told CBS Sports. “If you told me after fighting my last fight that I was fighting Conor McGregor next fight, I would be like, ‘You are on drugs.’ At the end of the d...
